final:
// // This comment suggests that the output X will be HIGH when A is LOW, SLEEP_B is HIGH, VPWR is less than or equal to zero, KAGND is HIGH, and VPB is less than or equal to VNB.
module top_module(
    output X,
    input A,
    input SLEEP_B,
    input VPWR,
    input KAGND,
    input VPB,
    input VNB
);assign X = (A == 1) && (SLEEP_B == 0) && (VPWR > 0) && (KAGND == 0) && (VPB > VNB);

endmodule
